title: Controllable reasoning-budget force sequence
description: Construct the production CommonSampler with model-tokenized reasoning tags, exercise its public force and last-token observations around one complete forced ending sequence, and compare those bounded observations exactly.

source.note: The parity boundary deliberately exposes only public CommonSampler behavior: model-tokenized configuration, force_reasoning_end return values, and last_token. It does not inspect the standalone sampler's internal state.
